blocks.content: She ran into Ryan at the grocery store the day before Thanksgiving. He was in the cereal aisle with a cart and a list in his hand, and he looked up and grinned like no time had passed at all.

blocks.speaker: Ryan
blocks.content: So do you. College agrees with you.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: Good. He's at USC. Stayed out for Thanksgiving.

blocks.speaker: Ryan
blocks.content: Good for him. Tell him I said hey.
They said goodbye and parted in different directions. She got what she came for and drove home.
Then she went inside and helped her mom with the stuffing and didn't mention Ryan until later that night, when Kit called.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: Good. Saw Ryan at the grocery store actually.
A beat — short, barely there — before Kit answered.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: Good. Engineering at Tech. He seemed genuinely happy.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: He said to tell you hey.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: I'm fine. He's allowed to be happy. I'm glad he's happy.
